summary: Kept #45222 as the live canonical for the loopback WebSocket handshake regression, left other gateway/health/restart reports open as related or independent subfamilies, routed security-flagged PRs #47222 and #63651 to central OpenClaw security handling, and produced a narrow fix artifact because later handshake reports remain open and no viable canonical PR is available.
